opening_line: Flagging this account for immediate attention — our latest review has surfaced some concerning patterns.
body_paragraph: There are unresolved items from the last business review that have not been formally closed. The customer has brought these up in multiple interactions, and our current plan does not address them adequately. We should schedule a dedicated session to work through these concerns.
closing_line: Please loop in the account executive — this needs coordinated action across the team.
